summary: Customer Wallet Management Feature Testing - Backend APIs fully tested and passing (16/16 tests + 2 skipped API key tests). Documentation page verified with Admin API section. Frontend UI login issue blocked dashboard wallet management testing.

minor.issue: Response missing 'success' field at top level - returns {message, data} on 200. This is inconsistent with documented response format showing 'success: true'
Same response format inconsistency - missing 'success' field

Frontend: Customers page has Credit Wallet and Debit Wallet buttons with proper modal handling (Components/Page/Customers/index.tsx)
Developer Guide: /app/DEVELOPER_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md exists and includes wallet management examples
